suite.name: Tasks

test.name: Deve poder cadastrar uma nova tarefa

kw.name: Open Application
kw.doc: Opens a new application to the given Appium server. Capabilities of appium server, Android and iOS, Please check https://appium.io/docs/en/2.19/guides/caps/ | *Option* | *Man.* | *Description* | | remote_url | Yes | Appium server url | | alias | No | alias |

kw.name: Wait Until Page Contains
kw.doc: Waits until the ``text`` appears on the current page.

kw.name: Input Text
kw.doc: Types the given ``text`` into the text field identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Wait Until Element Is Visible
kw.msg: xpath criteria: //*[contains(@text, "nova tarefa")] xpath criteria: //*[contains(@text, "nova tarefa")] xpath criteria: //*[contains(@text, "nova tarefa")]
kw.doc: Waits until the element specified by the ``locator`` is visible.

kw.name: Input Text
kw.msg: Typing text 'Estudar XPath' into text field 'xpath=//*[contains(@text, "nova tarefa")]'
kw.doc: Types the given ``text`` into the text field identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Sleep
kw.doc: Pauses the test executed for the given time.

kw.name: Capture Page Screenshot
kw.doc: Takes a screenshot of the current page and embeds it into the log.

kw.name: Close Application
kw.doc: Closes the current application and the webdriver session.

suite.doc: Suite de testes do cadastro de tarefas
